[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101000000 2
1 1100100100 4
2 1010000000 2
3 0001000000 1
4 0101000000 2
5 1101100101 6
6 1111000000 4
7 0000000000 a

01 10 0111110001 6
12 21 1111110101 8
23 32 1111100110 7
34 43 1111010010 6
45 54 1111010010 6
56 65 1101101111 8
67 76 1111101101 8
70 07 1111100001 6

02 20 1101100101 6 match 5
13 31 1111110011 8
24 42 1111110110 8
35 53 1111000010 5
46 64 1111111111 a
57 75 1111000010 5
60 06 1101101101 7
71 17 1111110001 7

03 30 1111100011 7
14 41 0111110011 7
25 52 1101100110 6
36 63 1111101111 9
47 74 1011010010 5
50 05 1101100011 6
61 16 1111111101 9
72 27 1110100100 5

04 40 0111110011 7
15 51 1111110011 8
26 62 1101101101 7
37 73 1111000010 5
